name: 06-09-fix-desktop-canary-url-env
title: Fix desktop Canary URL env validation
description: Packaged Canary desktop builds can crash at renderer startup when NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_WEB_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_ELECTRIC_URL/RELAY_URL are missing or blank in build env. Fix the desktop env handling, validate build, then push and trigger Canary packaging.
creator: bichengyu
